name: x-spreadsheet
when_to_use: 需要轻量 Excel 风格网格、单元格编辑与多工作表时用它,而非手写 HTML table/canvas——原生在选区、冻结窗格、公式输入和剪贴板交互上会失败;非做长表单、数据库级虚拟表或完整 Excel 兼容。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能生成静态 table,做不到可靠选区、键盘导航、单元格编辑、合并与工作表状态;x-spreadsheet 用单 bundle 提供可编辑 canvas 表格,补齐只有计算引擎而没有 UI 的空档。

data_in.note: sheets 原样传给上游 Spreadsheet.loadData。rows/cells 的 key 是从 0 开始的十进制索引字符串;下面只保留稳定高频字段,不把二维数组误喂给它。所有可选字段均注明默认。

<columnIndex>.text: string —— 单元格显示/公式文本,必填

spec.note: canvas 表格必须显式得到 viewport 高度;默认 480px,宽度取容器 clientWidth,铁律 3 禁 vh/百分比高。上游 view.height/view.width 回调返回像素数。

en.when_to_use: Use it when you need a lightweight Excel-style grid with cell editing and multiple worksheets instead of hand-writing an HTML table/canvas, which tends to fail at selection, frozen panes, formula input, and clipboard interaction. It is not for long forms, database-scale virtual tables, or full Excel compatibility.
en.why_valuable: AI defaults to a static table and cannot reliably provide selection, keyboard navigation, cell editing, merges, and worksheet state. x-spreadsheet supplies an editable canvas spreadsheet in one bundle, filling the UI gap left by calculation-only engines.

data_in.note: sheets is passed unchanged to upstream Spreadsheet.loadData. rows/cells keys are zero-based decimal index strings. The schema retains only stable, common fields and does not incorrectly feed it a 2D array. Defaults are documented for every optional field.

spec.note: The canvas spreadsheet must receive an explicit viewport height. Default is 480px, and width uses container clientWidth; rule 3 forbids vh or percentage heights. Upstream view.height/view.width callbacks return pixel values.

example._why: 表格 data 采用稀疏 rows/cells 索引对象,高歧义且不是二维数组;minimal 让 AI 一次拼对 loadData 形状。

uplink: 编辑状态保留在 sheet 实例内;消费 AI 需要读取时调用 sheet.getData(),再自行按 carrier 写上行或下载导出,不焊接统一事件契约。

carriers.widget: conditional:容器与 xspreadsheet.css 均落 ShadowRoot;需探针确认上游浮层/右键菜单没有 document 级选择器泄漏

isolation.evidence: globalDomMutation=yes: appends context menus (`document.body.appendChild(c.el)`) and a modal dimmer overlay (`document.body.appendChild(this.dimmer.el)`) to document.body — these escape any shadow root. globalEvents=yes: binds `document.body` 'click' for click-outside-close (`xclickoutside`) and `window` 'keydown'/'resize'. globalStyleInjection=no for the main document: the sole `createElement('style')` targets the PRINT iframe's document (`@page` print CSS), not document.head. shadowCompatible=no: only the grid renders in the container; menus/modal overlays live on document.body outside the shadow, and the import is broken regardless.
